title: Create a Basic 3×3 Grid
description: Create a 3-column, 3-row grid with 9 items using CSS Grid.

solution.css:
.grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 10px; }
.grid div { background: #4ecdc4; padding: 30px; text-align: center; border-radius: 4px; }

title: Sidebar Layout with Grid
description: Create a layout with 250px sidebar and flexible main area using grid.
